subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath singled Himself out through grandeur and majesty, and Who warbleth with might and transcendence, He Who hath illumined the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی توحد بالعظمه و الکبریاء و تغرد بالقدرة و الاستعلاء الذی انار افق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
